title: The Frozen Screen
content: Yesterday, my laptop screen suddenly froze while I was writing a report. The mouse would not move, and none of the keys responded. At first, I worried that something serious had happened. I waited a few minutes, but nothing changed. Finally, I restarted the computer using the power button. After the restart, everything worked normally again. I saved my document immediately to avoid losing any progress. Since then, I have remembered to save my work more often while using my computer.
